tripOverview.intro: San Juan combines colonial charm with vibrant Caribbean energy, offering cobblestone streets, pristine beaches, and world-class dining. This romantic destination perfect for couples seeking adventure and relaxation in a stunning tropical setting.
tripOverview.vibe: A perfect blend of historic romance, tropical beaches, and vibrant culture creating unforgettable memories for couples.

destinationOverview.bestTime: April offers perfect weather with lower humidity, fewer crowds, and ideal beach conditions.

attractions.name: Old San Juan
attractions.desc: Colorful colonial district with cobblestone streets and historic charm.

attractions.name: El Yunque Rainforest
attractions.desc: Tropical rainforest with waterfalls and hiking trails.

attractions.name: Condado Beach
attractions.desc: Popular beach with golden sand and beach bars.

attractions.name: Camuy Caves
attractions.desc: Underground cave system with impressive limestone formations.

destinationOverview.transportation: San Juan has excellent public transportation including buses and the Tren Urbano metro system connecting major areas. Taxis and ride-sharing services like Uber are readily available throughout the city and to beaches. Rental cars are recommended for exploring El Yunque and other areas outside the metro.
destinationOverview.tip: Use the free trolleys in Old San Juan and always negotiate taxi fares upfront - ride-sharing apps provide transparent pricing and are LGBTQ+ friendly.
destinationOverview.safety: San Juan is generally safe for tourists, especially in main tourist areas, but exercise normal precautions.
destinationOverview.airaloText: Stay connected with affordable eSIM data plans covering Puerto Rico and the Caribbean region.

days.intro: Start your romantic getaway exploring the colorful colonial streets of Old San Juan.

morning.name: Arrive & Check-in
morning.desc: Settle into your hotel and get oriented.

morning.name: Mallorca Restaurant Lunch
morning.desc: Traditional Puerto Rican vegetarian dishes in historic setting.

afternoon.name: Old San Juan Walking Tour
afternoon.desc: Explore colorful colonial architecture and cobblestone streets.

afternoon.name: El Morro Fort
afternoon.desc: Historic fortress with stunning ocean views.

evening.name: Café Puerto Rico
evening.desc: Romantic dinner with traditional Puerto Rican cuisine.

days.tip: Free trolleys run through Old San Juan - perfect for getting around without walking on cobblestones all day.

days.intro: Spend your first full day soaking up the Caribbean sun at beautiful Condado Beach.

morning.name: Breakfast at Panadería España
morning.desc: Fresh pastries and coffee before beach day.

morning.name: Condado Beach
morning.desc: Golden sand beach with calm waters perfect for swimming.

afternoon.name: Beach Lunch at Oceano
afternoon.desc: Oceanfront dining with vegetarian options and sea views.

afternoon.name: Beach Activities
afternoon.desc: Paddleboard or kayak rental for water adventure.

evening.name: Sunset at Condado
evening.desc: Romantic sunset watching from the beach.

evening.name: Verde Mesa
evening.desc: Farm-to-table vegetarian restaurant with creative dishes.

days.tip: Condado Beach has LGBTQ+ friendly areas and the nearby La Placita district comes alive at night.

days.intro: Explore the tropical rainforest and discover beautiful waterfalls in El Yunque National Forest.

afternoon.name: La Mina Trail Hike
afternoon.desc: Easy hike to stunning waterfall with swimming opportunity.

afternoon.name: Picnic Lunch
afternoon.desc: Pack lunch to enjoy in the rainforest setting.

afternoon.name: Yokahu Tower
afternoon.desc: Observation tower with panoramic forest views.

evening.name: Return to San Juan
evening.desc: Drive back to the city for evening activities.

evening.name: Santaella
evening.desc: Upscale dining with modern Puerto Rican cuisine.

days.tip: Bring water shoes for waterfall swimming and rain gear as tropical showers are common in the rainforest.

days.intro: Dive deep into Puerto Rican culture with museums, art, and local neighborhoods.

morning.name: Museo de San Juan
morning.desc: Learn about the city's rich history and culture.

morning.name: Casa Blanca
morning.desc: Historic house with beautiful gardens and harbor views.

afternoon.name: Lunch at Deaverdura
afternoon.desc: All-vegetarian restaurant with creative plant-based dishes.

afternoon.name: Santurce Art Walk
afternoon.desc: Explore street art and galleries in the creative district.

afternoon.name: La Placita de Santurce
afternoon.desc: Vibrant market square with local atmosphere.

evening.name: Coffee at Café Cuatro Sombras
evening.desc: Local roastery with excellent coffee and relaxed vibe.

evening.name: Marmalade Restaurant
evening.desc: Fine dining with innovative vegetarian tasting menu.

days.tip: Santurce is very LGBTQ+ friendly and has the best street art scene - perfect for romantic photo opportunities.

days.intro: Enjoy a laid-back day at Ocean Park Beach with its bohemian vibe and pristine sands.

morning.name: Breakfast at Kasalta
morning.desc: Famous local bakery with fresh pastries and coffee.

morning.name: Ocean Park Beach
morning.desc: Quieter beach with artistic community and clear waters.

afternoon.name: Beach Picnic
afternoon.desc: Fresh fruit and vegetarian snacks from local market.

afternoon.name: Beach Massage
afternoon.desc: Couples massage on the beach for ultimate relaxation.

evening.name: Sunset Beach Walk
evening.desc: Romantic stroll along the shoreline as the sun sets.

evening.name: Acapulco Taquería Mexicana
evening.desc: Casual Mexican with great vegetarian tacos and margaritas.

days.tip: Ocean Park Beach has a more local, artistic vibe and is very welcoming to all couples - great for a relaxing day.

days.intro: Experience San Juan's vibrant culinary scene and nightlife in the trendy districts.

morning.name: Late Breakfast at Spoon
morning.desc: Trendy brunch spot with excellent vegetarian options.

morning.name: Bacardí Distillery Tour
morning.desc: Learn about rum making with tastings (mocktails available).

afternoon.name: Lunch at Jungle Bird
afternoon.desc: Tropical-themed restaurant with creative vegetarian dishes.

afternoon.name: Rest at Hotel
afternoon.desc: Siesta time to prepare for evening activities.

evening.name: Pre-dinner at La Factoría
evening.desc: World-famous bar with craft cocktails and vibrant atmosphere.

evening.name: Dinner at José Enrique
evening.desc: No-reservations spot famous for creative vegetarian adaptations.

evening.name: Nightlife in La Placita
evening.desc: Bar hopping in the lively nightlife district.

days.tip: La Placita comes alive after 10 PM - it's Puerto Rico's party central and very LGBTQ+ friendly with diverse crowds.

days.intro: Your final full day combines beach relaxation with romantic experiences and sunset views.

morning.name: Breakfast in Bed
morning.desc: Room service breakfast for a romantic start.

morning.name: Condado Lagoon Kayak
morning.desc: Peaceful lagoon paddling with mangrove exploration.

afternoon.name: Lunch at 1919 Restaurant
afternoon.desc: Oceanfront fine dining with stunning vegetarian options.

afternoon.name: Couples Spa Treatment
afternoon.desc: Relaxing spa experience at luxury hotel.

evening.name: Sunset Catamaran Cruise
evening.desc: Romantic sailing with drinks and snacks included.

evening.name: Final Dinner at Pikayo
evening.desc: Celebration dinner at renowned restaurant with tasting menu.

days.tip: Book the sunset cruise early as it's popular with couples - the views of Old San Juan from the water are unforgettable.

days.intro: Enjoy final moments in paradise before heading home with unforgettable memories.

morning.name: Final Coffee at Café Cuatro Sombras
morning.desc: Last taste of Puerto Rican coffee culture.

morning.name: Souvenir Shopping
morning.desc: Pick up gifts and mementos from local artisans.

afternoon.name: Hotel Checkout
afternoon.desc: Pack up and prepare for departure.

afternoon.name: Airport Transfer
afternoon.desc: Ride to Luis Muñoz Marín International Airport.

evening.name: Flight to Philadelphia
evening.desc: Depart San Juan with wonderful memories of your romantic getaway.

days.tip: Arrive at the airport 3 hours early for international flights and save some cash for last-minute souvenirs.

food.intro: San Juan's culinary scene blends Spanish, African, and indigenous flavors with excellent vegetarian options.
food.tip: Many restaurants can adapt dishes for vegetarians - don't hesitate to ask, and try local fruits like passion fruit and guava.

neighborhoods.name: Old San Juan
neighborhoods.desc: Historic colonial charm with cobblestone streets
neighborhoods.whyStay: Walking distance to major attractions and romantic atmosphere

neighborhoods.name: Condado
neighborhoods.desc: Modern beach district with resorts and nightlife
neighborhoods.whyStay: Best beaches, upscale dining, and LGBTQ+ friendly venues

neighborhoods.name: Isla Verde
neighborhoods.desc: Beach area near airport with resort hotels
neighborhoods.whyStay: Easy airport access and beautiful beach with water sports

luxury.name: El Convento Hotel
luxury.vibe: Historic luxury in Old San Juan

hotels.tip: Book Condado area hotels for the best balance of beach access, dining, and LGBTQ+ friendly atmosphere.

getYourGuide.name: Bioluminescent Bay Kayak Tour
getYourGuide.desc: Night kayaking in glowing waters near Fajardo with magical plankton.

getYourGuide.name: Cueva de Camuy Cave Tour
getYourGuide.desc: Underground adventure through impressive limestone cave formations.

getYourGuide.name: Food Walking Tour
getYourGuide.desc: Taste authentic Puerto Rican cuisine including vegetarian specialties.

hiddenGems.name: Paseo de la Princesa
hiddenGems.desc: Romantic waterfront promenade perfect for sunset walks.

hiddenGems.name: Cueva Ventana
hiddenGems.desc: Cave with stunning window opening overlooking the valley.

hiddenGems.name: Casa Bacardí
hiddenGems.desc: Historic rum distillery with tastings and Caribbean history.

packing.title: April 2026 - San Juan, Puerto Rico
packing.intro: Pack for warm tropical weather with occasional rain showers and beach activities.
packing.luggage: A medium suitcase plus carry-on should be sufficient for your 8-day romantic getaway.
packing.tip: Pack light fabrics that dry quickly and bring reef-safe sunscreen to protect Puerto Rico's coral reefs.

bookTrip.intro: Round-trip flights from Philadelphia to San Juan typically cost $400-600 per person in April.
